name: Talk / pitch
when_to_use: Make a presentation, pitch, or launch post land and move the audience

name: Narrative / essay
when_to_use: Give an essay, case study, or vision narrative momentum and an arc

name: Argument / memo
when_to_use: Frame a memo as where-we-are vs where-we-could-be to win the decision

name: General prose
when_to_use: Make a short announcement or post more compelling and memorable
